comment.body:
Saw this rumor(?) , huge if true, can’t believe semiconductor sector is pumping : 

Urgent Notice on the Rules for Determining the “Country of Origin” of Semiconductor Products

China Semiconductor Industry Association – April 11, 2025, 10:55 AM, Beijing

Click above to follow us

To all member companies:

According to the relevant regulations issued by the General Administration of Customs, the “country of origin” of integrated circuits is determined based on the place where the wafer is processed into chips. That is, the location where the wafer is turned into chips is considered the country of origin. Please pay close attention!

Please prepare the necessary PO certification materials in advance for customs inspection!

comment.body:
I don't want to be too fast to state anything, but if the market moves like this thats one good sign.
This means, algos are again set to mean reversion trading, and Fed and the gov came back to absorb the attacks really, as I described in today's post. 
This should reduce volatility.
Will wait till the closing.
